params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: orderBy
params.description: Sort order for pipelines (e.g., name, createdDate)

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of pipelines to return

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paginated results

items.docs: Returns a list of pipelines in the project. Pipelines are YAML-based CI/CD definitions stored in source repositories. Supports ordering and pagination.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

items.docs: Creates a new pipeline definition in the project. The pipeline references a YAML file in a source repository. After creation, the pipeline can be run manually or triggered by code changes.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: pipelineId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline

params.name: pipelineVersion
params.description: Specific version of the pipeline to retrieve

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific pipeline, including its configuration, repository source, and revision. The pipelineId is the numeric identifier assigned when the pipeline was created.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: pipelineId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of runs to return

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paginated results

items.docs: Returns a list of runs (executions) for a specific pipeline. Includes the run state, result, timing, and template parameters used. Supports pagination through the continuationToken.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: pipelineId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline

params.name: pipelineVersion
params.description: Specific version of the pipeline to run

items.docs: Triggers a new run of a pipeline. You can override template parameters, variables, the repository branch, and specify which stages to skip or include. The run is queued and executed when an agent becomes available.

info.name: Azure DevOps Get a pipeline run

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: pipelineId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline

params.name: runId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline run

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific pipeline run, including its state, result, template parameters, variables used, and timing. Poll this endpoint to monitor run progress.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: pipelineId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline

params.name: runId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline run

params.name: artifactName
params.description: Filter by a specific artifact name

params.name: $expand
params.description: Expand additional artifact details

items.docs: Returns a list of artifacts published by a specific pipeline run. Artifacts can include compiled binaries, test results, container images, or any other files published using the PublishBuildArtifacts or PublishPipelineArtifact task.
